name: Grune Bohnen Mit Birner
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and trim the runner beans, then slice them thinly.
2. Par boil the sliced runner beans in salted water for 12 minutes.
3. Drain the boiled beans and toss them with butter.
4. Add the sliced pealed pears to the butter mixture.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Stir in sugar and vinegar, mixing well until combined.
